content.text:
# Claude Code Help

## Available Slash Commands
- `/help` — Show this help message
- `/clear` — Clear conversation history
- `/compact` — Compact conversation to save context
- `/cost` — Show token usage and cost
- `/status` — Show current status
- `/exit` — Exit Claude Code

## What I Can Do
- **Read & edit files** in your project
- **Run bash commands** (git, npm, build tools, etc.)
- **Search code** with grep/glob
- **Create & refactor** code
- **Commit changes** to git
- **Create pull requests** via `gh`

## Current Context
- **CWD:** `/home/skogix/claude`
- **Branch:** `master` (clean)
- **Date:** 2026-03-01

## Tips
- Ask me to explore your codebase, fix bugs, add features
- I can run multiple commands in parallel for efficiency
- I'll ask before doing destructive operations
- I never push to remote unless you explicitly ask

What would you like to work on?

file.content:
# ~/claude — Claude's HQ

Everything here belongs to claude — change freely.

## Always

- Tasks: `bd` (beads). Session hook injects docs. Never TodoWrite/TaskCreate/markdown.
- Session close: `git add <files> && git commit -m "..." && git push` — not done until pushed.
- `@` = path reference shorthand, never literal in filenames.
- No sed/awk — use yq, jq, proper tools.
- RTK hook auto-rewrites commands transparently.

## Routes

| Intent | Where |
|--------|-------|
| Track tasks / find work | `bd ready`, `bd list`, `bd show <id>` |
| Behavioral rules | @RULES.md |
| Architecture history | @DECISIONS.md |
| RTK reference | @~/.claude/RTK.md |
| Work on skogapi | @projects/skogapi/main.py |
| Work on newinstall | @projects/newinstall/ |
| Plugin scaffold | @projects/skogai-core/ |
| Session journals | @journal/ |
| Email system | @email/SKOGAI.md |
| Global claude config | @global/ (mirror of ~/.claude/) |
| Reference hooks/skills | @.todo/ (claudeignored — read manually) |
| Sync repos | @scripts/csync.sh |

## Routes

Everything here belongs to claude — change freely.

## Always

- Tasks: `bd` (beads). Session hook injects docs. Never TodoWrite/TaskCreate/markdown.
- Session close: `git add <files> && git commit -m "..." && git push` — not done until pushed.
- `@` = path reference shorthand, never literal in filenames.
- No sed/awk — use yq, jq, proper tools.
- RTK hook auto-rewrites commands transparently.

## Routes

| Intent | Where |
|--------|-------|
| Track tasks / find work | `bd ready`, `bd list`, `bd show <id>` |
| Behavioral rules | @RULES.md |
| Architecture history | @DECISIONS.md |

| Reference hooks/skills | @.todo/ (claudeignored — read manually) |
| Sync repos | @scripts/csync.sh |

---

```markdown
# SkogAI

A lean, intentional AI working environment built around Claude Code CLI.

## Core Identity
- Home base: `~/claude/` — Claude's HQ, change freely
- Task system: `bd` (beads) — no TodoWrite, no markdown tasks
- Session close ritual: `git add <files> && git commit && git push` — not done until pushed
- No sed/awk — use yq, jq, proper tools
- RTK hook auto-rewrites commands transparently

## Architecture (as of 2026-03)
- Session startup hook: currently NOT firing (system prompt stays at 195 tokens)
- @ injection in messages: working
- Context on open: ~7-9k tokens (vs old ~50k) — lean is back
- MCP servers: present but not blowing up context on load

## Methods
- Old SkogAI: minimal context, direct execution, no preamble
- Full Claude Code CLI: available when heavy lifting is needed
- Hybrid: lean default, escalate to full-force when the task demands it

## Key Refs
- Behavioral rules: ~/claude/RULES.md
- Architecture decisions: ~/claude/DECISIONS.md
- Global config: ~/claude/global/ (mirror of ~/.claude/)
- Projects: ~/claude/projects/
- Email system: ~/claude/email/SKOGAI.md
```

---

That's genuinely all I have right now — the bones of the system from what came through in this conversation. Want me to flesh it out with actual file contents and write it properly, or is this the vibe you're going for?
